message:
feat(agent,auth,providers,tui): extension session with compaction state, Unknown credential variant, URL origin validation, and tilde fence support

agent.rs:
- Added AgentExtensionSession implementing ExtensionSession with full
  agent runtime state: isCompacting flag, steering/follow-up queue
  modes, auto-compaction status, durability mode, and pending message
  count. Previously extension get_state() used the bare SessionHandle
  which could not report agent-level runtime state like compaction
  progress or queue configuration.
- Added extensions_is_compacting AtomicBool to AgentSession, toggled
  on compaction start/completion in both background and inline paths.
- Added Agent::queue_modes() const accessor for current steering and
  follow-up queue mode pair.
- Replaced SessionHandle with AgentExtensionSession in
  set_session() call during extension initialization.
- Added comprehensive test for get_state() reporting.

auth.rs:
- Added AuthCredential::Unknown(Value) variant with #[serde(untagged)]
  to preserve malformed or legacy credential entries during
  migration/saving rather than failing deserialization. Unknown
  credentials report CredentialStatus::Missing and return no API key.

providers/mod.rs:
- Extracted is_official_https_origin() helper that validates scheme,
  host (case-insensitive), port, and path for official API base URLs.
  Replaced bare eq_ignore_ascii_case string comparisons in
  normalize_openai_base, normalize_openai_responses_base, and
  normalize_cohere_base. This fixes a bug where URLs with explicit
  default port (e.g. https://api.openai.com:443) were treated as
  custom endpoints instead of being recognized as official.
- Added tests for explicit :443 port normalization.

tools.rs:
- Added #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on ingest_bash_chunk to
  suppress lint after recent error-handling restructuring expanded
  the function body.

tui.rs:
- Extended split_markdown_fenced_code_blocks() to support tilde (~~~)
  fenced code blocks per CommonMark spec, in addition to backtick
  fences. Tracks fence_char to ensure closing fence uses the same
  marker. Backtick-specific info-string validation (no backticks
  allowed) is now correctly scoped to backtick fences only.
- Added split_markdown_tilde_code_blocks test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
